doc: 20 'almost matches but isn't' cases consumed by the substring quote verifier (workspace C). For every case, doc_text_at_claimed_offsets != claimed_quote, so the verifier MUST return a mismatch. Categories: off_by_one_char, whitespace, smart_quotes, ocr_confusion, offset_drift, case.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: dropped the 'e' from 'Intesa' to fabricate a near-miss quote
cases.notes: Offsets point to the correct region; quote text differs by one deleted character.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: duplicated the 'c' in 'Banca'
cases.notes: One inserted character; offsets unchanged.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: changed the leading digit of the amount from '120,000' to '121,000'
cases.notes: High-stakes single-character substitution: amount inflation by 1k.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: swapped 'es' to 'se' in 'Intesa'
cases.notes: Levenshtein-1 transposition; common LLM hallucination from training data.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: doubled the space between 'Banca' and 'Intesa'
cases.notes: Whitespace insertion only.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: replaced the regular space with U+00A0 NO-BREAK SPACE
cases.notes: Visually identical; copy-paste from Word/Excel often introduces NBSP.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: replaced the regular space with a TAB (U+0009)
cases.notes: Tabs are common in CSV-derived docs.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: replaced the regular space with U+000A LINE FEED
cases.notes: Line breaks injected from PDF column-break artifacts.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: appended a trailing space to the claimed quote that isn't in the doc at this offset range
cases.notes: Trailing-whitespace forgery; verifier must NOT silently strip.

cases.doc_text: The minister stated: "I refuse the proposal" on the record.
cases.what_attacker_did: replaced ASCII double quotes with U+201C/U+201D curly quotes
cases.notes: LLMs trained on prose love to 'beautify' quotes; verifier must reject.

cases.doc_text: The board's decision was challenged.
cases.what_attacker_did: replaced ASCII apostrophe (U+0027) with U+2019 RIGHT SINGLE QUOTATION MARK
cases.notes: Most common typographic substitution in LLM output.

cases.doc_text: The fine - 50,000 EUR - was upheld.
cases.what_attacker_did: replaced the ASCII hyphen-minus with U+2014 EM DASH on both sides
cases.notes: Em dash injection is a frequent LLM 'improvement'.

cases.doc_text: Director: M. Iliescu. Tax ID: RO12345678. Reference: II-09/2024.
cases.what_attacker_did: OCR-confused the capital 'O' in 'RO' with digit '0'
cases.notes: Romanian VAT ID prefix RO; flipping the O to 0 is an OCR-class bug.

cases.doc_text: Account holder: Luca Bianchi.
cases.what_attacker_did: OCR-confused the capital 'L' (or lowercase l) with digit '1'
cases.notes: Sans-serif fonts make L/l/1 visually identical.

cases.doc_text: Payment from Marco Rossi was received.
cases.what_attacker_did: OCR-split 'Ma' into 'rn' giving 'Rnarco' instead of 'Marco'
cases.notes: Classic OCR drift: 'rn' and 'm' are indistinguishable at low DPI.

cases.doc_text: The deposit was confirmed on 03/04/2025.
cases.what_attacker_did: OCR-split 'd' into 'cl'
cases.notes: Letter merger artifact, common in low-DPI scans.

cases.doc_text: Reference: H-09/2024 in the registry.
cases.what_attacker_did: OCR-split 'H' into 'II'
cases.notes: Roman-numeral / capital-letter confusion in stylised serif fonts.

cases.doc_text: Issued by SwissBank in Geneva.
cases.what_attacker_did: OCR-split 'w' into 'vv'
cases.notes: Especially common in old typewritten German-language docs where W is rendered as VV.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: quoted a string that exists in the doc, but at offsets pointing to a different region
cases.notes: Self-consistent quote text but offsets are wrong — verifier must compare doc[s:e] with quote_text, not just substring-search the doc.

cases.doc_text: Banca Intesa transferred 120,000 EUR to account 5512 on 2024-03-12.
cases.what_attacker_did: upper-cased a span the doc has in mixed case
cases.notes: LLM output 'normalized' the entity name; verifier must NOT silently case-fold.
